ham.subject: Scheduled Corporate VPN Maintenance – 2026-04-15
ham.body:
Hi Team,

Please be informed that the corporate VPN will undergo scheduled maintenance on 2026-04-15 from 22:00 UTC to 01:00 UTC. During this window, access to the VPN will be unavailable.

If you encounter any issues after the maintenance, please contact IT support.

Thank you.

Regards,
IT Operations Team

spam.subject: Urgent: Immediate Action Required – Microsoft 365 Account Password Expiry
spam.body:
Dear User,

Aapke Microsoft 365 account mein kuch unusual activity detect hui hai. Security protocol ke hisaab se, aapka password 24 ghante ke andar expire ho jaayega. Kripya neeche diye gaye link par click karke apna password reset karein, warna aapka account disable ho sakta hai.

<URL>

Yadi aap password reset nahi karte, to aapko important documents tak access nahi milega.

Thank you for your prompt attention.

Best regards,
Microsoft Security Team
